arts.ttl: Past and present weighing heaving on Borussia Dortmund after lackluster start to season
arts.sum: There have been minor successes — German Cup wins in 2017 and 2021, and reaching the Champions League final last season — but they’ve served only to raise the long-suffering Dortmund fans’ expectations by showing the team’s potential. Other clubs have assumed that mantle, with Bayer Leverkusen becoming the one to finally end Bayern’s 11-year run as champion by claiming its first Bundesliga title after a remarkable unbeaten campaign last season.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich star Mario Götze reflects on his stubbornness regarding his move in 2013.
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich playmaker Mario Götze recently reflected upon his move in the book “Stimmen der Eintracht”. Per @DIEZEIT via @iMiaSanMia, in a letter to himself, he mentioned: “I know you don’t think much of it when I tell you: stay in Dortmund a bit longer.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. St Pauli - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and St Pauli, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
